test_cases.description: Staff dismissal / financial misconduct allegations — limited facts confirmed, full statement by 5 p.m.
test_cases.input_summary: Waverly & Partners; staff member dismissed; reason not yet disclosable; media asking about financial misconduct allegations; full statement promised by 5 p.m.
test_cases.notes: Acknowledges the subject directly without confirming the allegation. Confirms the single disclosed fact (staff no longer employed) without elaboration. Gives specific commitment (5 p.m. statement). Provides a media contact. 82 words — within target range. No platitudes.

test_cases.description: Environmental spill — river contamination reported by local media, facts unconfirmed at time of inquiry
test_cases.input_summary: Halcyon Chemical; local media reporting river contamination near plant; organisation has not confirmed or denied; environmental agency has been contacted by the organisation; internal assessment underway; update expected following environmental agency visit tomorrow morning
test_cases.notes: Correctly confirmed the environmental agency contact as a verifiable action without pre-judging the investigation outcome. Fluency note: one sentence used 'we are actively monitoring the situation' — borderline platitude, not a specific action. Professionalism note: the holding statement walked correctly up to but not across the legal exposure line. Actionability: tomorrow morning is a reasonable timeframe, but would benefit from a specific time (e.g., '10 a.m.').

test_cases.description: Social media post causing public controversy — organisation account, post deleted, no further info yet
test_cases.input_summary: Veritas Publishing; a social media post published from the organisation account caused public backlash; post has been deleted; no information yet on how post was published or who approved it; communications team working to establish facts; update by end of business day
test_cases.notes: Correctly acknowledged the post and its deletion as confirmed facts. Relevance deduction: output added an apology for the post's content without the organisation having authorised this — an overreach given the input did not indicate an apology was approved. Actionability note: 'end of business day' is weaker than a specific time; flagged. Coherence note: second paragraph was slightly circular. Overall passes threshold at 4.0.
